name: note_lifecycle_example
description: Replaces the note footer's native state buttons with plugin-owned, state-responsive action buttons that show only the transitions valid for the note's current state. A worked reference for builders customizing the note lifecycle.

handlers.description: Footer button: lock the note (shown when LOCKED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: sign the note (shown when SIGNED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: unlock the note (shown when UNLOCKED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: push charges (shown when PUSHED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: check in (shown when CONVERTED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: no-show (shown when NOSHOW is an allowed next state).
Footer button: cancel the appointment (shown when CANCELLED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: restore a cancelled appointment (shown when REVERTED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: delete the note (shown when DELETED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: restore the note (shown when UNDELETED is an allowed next state).
Footer button: discharge the note (shown when DISCHARGED is an allowed next state).
Hides Canvas's native footer state buttons so this plugin's buttons replace them.
Reloads the note footer when any command is committed.
Reloads the note footer when the note transitions to a new state.
